scope.filter: sole-ref == IGU 2025; priority fields; row_id in [3, 22]

fills.note: MOL naming-ceremony press release, Riviera inauguration article, VesselFinder (IMO 9953248), and Ships Monthly all name the vessel Rex Tillerson.
All four sources identify Hudong-Zhonghua Shipbuilding as the builder of Rex Tillerson.
MOL press release (MOL is the owner/operator), Riviera, and Ships Monthly all name MOL for Rex Tillerson.
All four sources state 174,000 cbm capacity for Rex Tillerson.
MOL release (Sept 2024 naming/delivery), VesselFinder (built 2024), Riviera, and Ships Monthly all support 2024 delivery.
MOL naming-ceremony release, VesselFinder (IMO 9953250), Baird review, and Ships Monthly all name Umm Ghuwailina.
MOL release, Baird review, and Ships Monthly identify Hudong-Zhonghua Shipbuilding as builder of Umm Ghuwailina.
MOL press release and Ships Monthly both name MOL as owner/operator of Umm Ghuwailina.
All three sources state 174,000 cbm for Umm Ghuwailina.
MOL release (Sept 2024), VesselFinder (built 2024), Baird, and Ships Monthly all support 2024 delivery.
LNG Prime delivery article, Shipping Telegraph, VesselFinder (IMO 9953262), and Baird all name Hlaitan.
LNG Prime, Shipping Telegraph, and Baird identify Hudong-Zhonghua Shipbuilding as builder of Hlaitan.
LNG Prime and Shipping Telegraph both name MOL as a co-owner/operator chartering Hlaitan to QatarEnergy Trading.
LNG Prime and Baird both state 174,000 cbm for Hlaitan. (Shipping Telegraph did not state the figure.)
LNG Prime (Dec 2024 delivery), Shipping Telegraph, VesselFinder (built 2024), and Baird all support 2024 delivery.
MOL naming-ceremony release, Baird review, Hellenic Shipping News, and VesselFinder (IMO 9961477) all name Greenergy Ocean.
MOL release, Baird review, and Hellenic all identify Hudong-Zhonghua Shipbuilding as builder of Greenergy Ocean.
MOL release (MOL co-owns/commercially manages), Baird, and Hellenic all name MOL for Greenergy Ocean.
All three sources state 174,000 cbm for Greenergy Ocean.
MOL release (May 2024 naming), Baird, Hellenic, and VesselFinder (built 2024) all support 2024 delivery.

4 independent domains name the vessel Huashan: LNG Prime delivery article (IMO/delivery context), VesselFinder (IMO 9958652), Baird Maritime vessel review, and Riviera record-deliveries piece naming the Shaolin/Wudang/Kunlun/Emei/Huashan/Kongtong series.
3 independent domains state Hudong-Zhonghua Shipbuilding as builder of Huashan; full 'Hudong-Zhonghua Shipbuilding' string verified on each.

PARTIAL (1 domain). LNG Prime names 'United Liquefied Gas Shipping' as the ordering owner (a Cosco Shipping 81% / PetroChina 19% JV). OWNER DISCREPANCY: vessel databases (VesselFinder/MarineTraffic) and Baird Maritime label the owner/operator as 'COSCO Shipping Energy Transportation' (and registered owner 'United Success LNG Shipping Co' on some DB pages), not 'United Liquefied Gas'. Could not find a second independent domain that verbatim contains 'United Liquefied Gas' (Splash247, lngjournal, lngindustry, COSCO press, marinevesseltraffic all 403/blocked or named only COSCO/PetroChina). Human review of owner stylization recommended.
3 independent domains state 174,000 cbm for Huashan / the series. Verified as '174,000' on each.
LNG Prime reports delivery on May 30, 2024; VesselFinder lists Year of Build 2024 (IMO 9958652).
4 independent domains name the vessel Kongtong: LNG Prime delivery article, VesselFinder (IMO 9958664), Baird Maritime vessel review, and Riviera record-deliveries series list.
3 independent domains state Hudong-Zhonghua Shipbuilding as builder of Kongtong; full 'Hudong-Zhonghua Shipbuilding' string verified on each.

PARTIAL (1 domain). LNG Prime names 'United Liquefied Gas Shipping' as the ordering owner (Cosco Shipping 81% / PetroChina 19% JV). OWNER DISCREPANCY: vessel databases and Baird Maritime label owner/operator as 'COSCO Shipping Energy Transportation' (registered owner 'United Success LNG Shipping Co' on some DB pages), not 'United Liquefied Gas'. No second independent domain found that verbatim contains 'United Liquefied Gas' (others 403/blocked or named only COSCO/PetroChina). Human review of owner stylization recommended.
3 independent domains state 174,000 cbm for Kongtong / the series. Verified as '174,000' on each.
LNG Prime reports delivery on September 26, 2024; VesselFinder lists Year of Build 2024 (IMO 9958664).

documented_blanks.note: Owner-name discrepancy. Only LNG Prime (lngprime.com) verbatim contains 'United Liquefied Gas' (as 'United Liquefied Gas Shipping', a Cosco 81% / PetroChina 19% JV). Independent vessel databases (VesselFinder, MarineTraffic) and Baird Maritime name the owner/operator as 'COSCO Shipping Energy Transportation'; some DB pages list registered owner as 'United Success LNG Shipping Co'. So 'United Liquefied Gas' is supported by exactly 1 independent domain (partial, <2). Human review of whether the backend value should remain 'United Liquefied Gas' vs COSCO entity.

Same owner-name discrepancy as row 20. 'United Liquefied Gas' verified only on LNG Prime (1 domain, partial). Other independent sources name COSCO Shipping Energy Transportation / United Success LNG Shipping Co. Human review recommended.
